claim_boundary.next_gate: Repeat independent seed blocks and stress the acceptance statistic; then replay a confidence-qualified budget under calibrated backend properties or an independent backend transcript.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: A universal monotonic sampling law, calibrated backend evidence, real hardware execution, protocol or cryptographic soundness, sampling hardness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, or B10 credit.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: Paired ideal/light Aer shot-budget replay using one ordered measurement stream and one hidden bundle per trial.

requirements.label: accepted R121 shot-budget boundary is consumed
all budgets are prefixes of one ordered stream per trial
the hidden bundle is shared across budgets within each trial
thirty paired trials cover every profile and task
point estimates and Wilson intervals are both reported
adjacent paired pass/fail transitions are materialized
synthetic profiles are not mislabeled as hardware evidence
B4/B8/B10 advantage and BQP claims remain false
confidence-qualified crossing remains separate from point crossing
